title: COUNSELING SERVICES - 211info
text: NORTHWEST FAMILY SERVICES COUNSELING SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Professional counseling provided by licensed counselors. Services include individual, couples, and family counseling, as well as educational seminars and classes on topics including depression, anxiety, grief, anger management, body image, parenting, and communication skills. 6200 SE King Road Portland, OR 97222 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by service Email (503) 546-6377 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 546-6377 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, offers sliding scale and payment plans available DOCUMENTS: Intake and client information packet will be emailed or mailed when appointment is scheduled LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Tuesday/Thursday 1pm-4pm Services: Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OHP ENROLLMENT ASSISTANCE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - WOMEN'S HEALTH PROGRAM HOUSING/SHELTER - CASA ESPERANZA INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT EDUCATION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING INSIDE OUT SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - YOUTH ALCOHOL AND DRUG OUTPATIENT TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
